payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a full-height dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular central panel and narrow outer frame; vertical wood grain is visible, finish is low-sheen with minor scuffs and light reflections along the edges, photographed at roughly 1.0 m distance.
